final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing gongbi (工笔) handscroll painting depicting the Lantern Festival night scene in Tang Dynasty Chang'an city.

Style/medium: needs a 工笔重彩 (gongbi heavy-color) handscroll aesthetic — exact brushwork fineness and pigment layering are yours
Composition: must be a panoramic horizontal handscroll format (长卷)
Subject: must include the full panorama of Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during the Lantern Festival, with ten thousand lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at night, streets and architecture filled with lanterns
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, luminous night atmosphere lit entirely by massed lantern glow — exact light diffusion is yours
Color palette: needs a rich, jewel-toned 重彩 direction — exact pigment choices and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a traditional silk or paper handscroll surface treatment — exact texture weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
